prompt: A high-quality cinematic portrait of an 18-year-old girl named Saira. She is wearing a stylish dark green ombre textured sweater and trendy sunglasses. The background is a solid dark wall with a distinct, dramatic circular spotlight effect behind her, creating a halo appearance. The lighting is professional, capturing fine details with a shallow depth of field. The name 'Saira' is written elegantly in a sophisticated script font on the left side of the frame.
promptEn: A high-quality cinematic portrait of an 18-year-old girl named Saira. She is wearing a stylish dark green ombre textured sweater and trendy sunglasses. The background is a solid dark wall with a distinct, dramatic circular spotlight effect behind her, creating a halo appearance. The lighting is professional, capturing fine details with a shallow depth of field. The name 'Saira' is written elegantly in a sophisticated script font on the left side of the frame.
promptZh: 一张高质量的电影感肖像，主角是一位 18 岁的女孩，名为 Saira。她身穿 时尚的深绿色渐变质感毛衣，并佩戴潮流墨镜。背景是她身后的一面 纯色深色墙壁，带有独特的戏剧性圆形聚光灯效果，营造出光环般的视觉感。光影效果专业，捕捉了细腻的细节，并呈现出浅景深效果。名字“Saira”以优雅的艺术字体书写在画面左侧。
